blurb.en: The productive web framework for Elixir — peace of mind from prototype to production.
blurb.pt-BR: O framework web produtivo para Elixir — tranquilidade do protótipo à produção.

prs.title: Don't pass type: :id to scope references in generated migrations
Fix phx.new crash when parent directory contains a colon
Raise on list value in query string parameter encoding
Fix outdated flash component example in docs

blurb.en: Small, fast, modern HTTP server for Erlang/OTP.
blurb.pt-BR: Servidor HTTP pequeno, rápido e moderno para Erlang/OTP.

prs.title: Set SO_LINGER to {true, 0} before the linger loop

blurb.en: Support library for manipulating Web protocols (HTTP/1, HTTP/2, WebSocket parsing) underpinning Cowboy.
blurb.pt-BR: Library de apoio para manipular protocolos Web (parsing de HTTP/1, HTTP/2 e WebSocket) que dá base ao Cowboy.

prs.title: Use SWAR in cow_http1 header and path parsers

blurb.en: Automatic Erlang/OTP version management for Erlang.mk CI.
blurb.pt-BR: Gerenciamento automático de versões do Erlang/OTP para o CI do Erlang.mk.

prs.title: Add a FreeBSD test job to the shared CI workflow

blurb.en: Fast, lightweight DOM diffing/patching with no virtual DOM — the diffing engine used by Phoenix LiveView.
blurb.pt-BR: Diffing/patching de DOM rápido e leve, sem virtual DOM — o diffing engine usado pelo Phoenix LiveView.

prs.title: Fix CSP violation: use DOM style API instead of setAttribute("style")
